records.text: <label class="settingRow"><input id="restoreSession" type="checkbox" /> Restore last session on launch</label>
<label class="settingRow"><input id="openHomeNewTab" type="checkbox" /> New tabs open Kayock Home</label>
<label class="settingRow"><input id="spellcheckUS" type="checkbox" /> US English spell check / Hunter Writing highlights</label>
<label class="settingRow"><input id="largeMenus" type="checkbox" /> Larger context menus</label>
<label class="settingRow"><input id="reduceMotion" type="checkbox" /> Reduce motion / pulsing effects</label>
Download folderDefault Windows Downloads folder
Back up Marks, Tracks, Trophies, Settings, and Hunter Shield trust decisions before upgrading or showing a friend.
Kayock's garage. This is the future home for Repair Bay, local AI, file organizer, image tools, and model manager.
Compatibility hotfix log. If a site acts strange, check here first.
Kayock Browser 2.4 Alpha — Hunter Workspaces. Comfort build: larger UI options, readable fonts, improved context menus, zoom controls, Hunter Shield, and Daily Driver Alpha fixes.
For showing a friend: use DuckDuckGo, Wikipedia, GitHub, YouTube, and your saved Marks. Trust scripts only on sites you actually know.
<input id="homeQuery" type="text" placeholder="Search or enter a site..." />
Shortcuts: Ctrl+T new tab · Ctrl+W close tab · Ctrl+L address bar · Ctrl+J trophies/downloads · Ctrl+U shield · Ctrl +/- zoom · Esc close panels
const { app, BrowserWindow, ipcMain, shell, session, Menu, dialog, clipboard, nativeImage } = require('electron');
// Kayock 2.2: force US English spellcheck early so Chromium enables dictionaries.
// Main-process mirror of temporary Allow Once domains. Renderer also keeps its own
// runtime Set, but the browser process owns lifecycle cleanup so shutdown or
// renderer failure cannot accidentally carry temporary trust forward.
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'security-block', message: 'Blocked non-http external URL.', url: String(rawUrl || '') });
shell.openExternal(rawUrl).catch((err) => sendDiagnostic({ type: 'external-open-error', message: err.message, url: rawUrl }));
const blockedPermissions = new Set(['clipboard-read', 'media', 'geolocation', 'notifications', 'midiSysex', 'openExternal']); // fullscreen + pointer lock allowed for video players
type: 'permission-blocked', permission, origin, at: new Date().toISOString()
type: 'request-blocked', permission: 'external-scheme', origin: url, at: new Date().toISOString()
try { await fsp.mkdir(folder, { recursive: true }); } catch {}
const speed = Math.max(0, Math.round((received - lastBytes) / elapsed));
mainWindow.webContents.send('kayock-diagnostic-event', { type: 'toast', title, message, at: new Date().toISOString() });
if (!candidate.startsWith(targetFolder + path.sep) && candidate !== targetFolder) return false;
const host = (() => { try { return new URL(contents.getURL()).hostname.replace(/^www\./, ''); } catch { return 'page'; } })();
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'media-hunter', message: 'Page screenshot captured into Trophy Room.', url: savePath });
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'duplicate-warning', message: `Already acquired or downloading similar file: ${filename}. Kayock will save a renamed copy if you continue.`, url });
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'download-started', message: 'Kayock started a download from Media Hunter / Trophy Room.', url });
// Open OAuth/login popups as normal browser windows instead of silently failing.
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'popup-to-tab', message: 'Popup was opened as a Kayock tab.', url });
// Kayock 2.2 Hunter Writing: spelling suggestions for editable fields.
template.push({ label: 'No suggestions found', enabled: false });
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'spellcheck-dictionary', message: `Added word to dictionary: ${params.misspelledWord}` });
{ label: 'Acquire Image in Trophy Room', click: () => startSessionDownload(src) },
{ label: 'Open Image in System Browser', click: () => safeOpenExternal(src) },
{ label: `Acquire ${mediaType === 'video' ? 'Video' : 'Audio'} in Trophy Room`, click: () => startSessionDownload(src) },
{ label: `Open ${mediaType === 'video' ? 'Video' : 'Audio'} in System Browser`, click: () => safeOpenExternal(src) },
const label = looksLikeDownloadUrl(link) ? 'Acquire File / Model in Trophy Room' : 'Acquire Link in Trophy Room';
{ label: 'Open Link in New Tab', click: () => mainWindow?.webContents?.send('kayock-open-url-in-tab', { url: link, active: true }) },
{ label: 'Open Link in Background Tab', click: () => mainWindow?.webContents?.send('kayock-open-url-in-tab', { url: link, active: false }) },
{ label: 'Open Link in New Window', click: () => safeOpenExternal(link) },
{ label: 'Save Page Screenshot to Trophy Room', click: () => savePageScreenshot(contents) },
{ label: 'Open Page in System Browser', click: () => page && safeOpenExternal(page) },
{ label: 'Inspect Element', enabled: DEV_TOOLS_ENABLED, visible: DEV_TOOLS_ENABLED, click: () => contents.inspectElement(params.x, params.y) }
type: 'renderer-gone', message: details.reason || 'renderer process ended', at: new Date().toISOString()
// Kayock Core 2.0 Alpha: capture zoom shortcuts even when focus is inside a webview.
// Stable Alpha 1.1.1: let embedded players such as YouTube enter/leave true fullscreen.
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'spellcheck', message: 'US English spell check enabled for Hunter Writing.' });
message: `Main process cleared ${count} Allow Once site(s) during ${reason}.`
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'security-block', message: 'Blocked show-item outside Trophy Room/download folder.' });
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'security-block', message: 'Blocked open-path outside Trophy Room/download folder.' });
if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') return { ok: false, error: 'No URL provided.' };
if (!/^https?:\/\//i.test(url)) return { ok: false, error: 'Only http/https downloads are allowed.' };
if (!item) return { ok: false, error: 'Download is no longer active.' };
// Main-side session hygiene for Hunter Shield Allow Once rules.
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'allow-once-added-main', message: `Main process tracked temporary trust for: ${normalizedHost}` });
// Kayock Core 2.1.2 Alpha: apply zoom natively to the active/target guest webContents.
applied.push({ id: target.id, reason, url: target.getURL?.() || '' });
// Focused guest webContents catches cases where a page opens a new browsing context.
// URL/host fallback for <webview> targets when getWebContentsId is unreliable.
try { wantedHost = url ? new URL(url).hostname : ''; } catch {}
if (!applied.length) return { ok: false, error: 'No guest webContents accepted zoom.', zoom };
sendDiagnostic({ type: 'zoom-applied', message: `Zoom applied to ${applied.length} content view(s).`, zoom, url });
if (!url || !/^https?:\/\//i.test(url)) return { ok: false, error: 'Only http/https URLs can be opened externally.' };
// Stable Alpha 1.1.1: app-level fullscreen fallback for F11 and stubborn video players.
description: Operator-facing desktop environment built on Kayock Browser.
"description": "Kayock Browser 2.5.1 Release Candidate: hardened browser foundation with packaging and startup fixes.",
setWebviewZoom: (webContentsId, factor, url) => ipcRenderer.invoke('kayock-set-webview-zoom', { webContentsId, factor, url }),
// Kayock 2.4: default to compact icon rail. Users may pin it open.

const defaultSettings = { searchEngine: 'duckduckgo', restoreSession: true, openHomeNewTab: true, downloadFolder: '', defaultZoom: 1, uiSize: 'large', uiFont: 'legible', spellcheckUS: true, largeMenus: true, reduceMotion: false };
// Kayock 2.1.2: Allow Once is intentionally session-only.
// It never gets written to localStorage or exported in Vault backups.
const panels = () => [shieldPanel, bookmarksPanel, historyPanel, downloadsPanel, settingsPanel, diagnosticsPanel, aboutPanel, workshopPanel].filter(Boolean);
const defaultShield = { mode: 'balanced', trustedSites: [], blockedSites: [], events: [] };
dyslexic: "'OpenDyslexic', 'Comic Sans MS', Verdana, Arial, sans-serif",
.topbar button, .topbar input, .sidePanel button, .sidePanel input, .sidePanel select { font-size: ${Math.round(14 * scale)}px !important; }
function getHost(url) { try { return new URL(url).hostname.replace(/^www\./, ''); } catch { return ''; } }
return false; // Balanced and Hunter Mode both start with JavaScript blocked for unknown sites.
if (shieldBtn) shieldBtn.textContent = allowed || internal ? '◉ Shield' : '◉ Shield 🔴';
try { return new URL(url).hostname.replace('www.', ''); } catch { return 'New Hunt'; }
alert('Kayock can only acquire http/https links right now.');
function getZoomMap() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('kayockSiteZoom') || '{}'); } catch { return {}; } }
function clampZoom(value) { return Math.min(2.5, Math.max(0.75, Number(value) || 1)); }
// Kayock 2.1.2: prefer native Electron zoom via main-process IPC.
// The previous CSS injection fallback worked for stubborn pages but could break
// viewport layouts and cost CPU on media-heavy pages.
if (!result?.ok) addDiagnostic({ type: 'zoom-error', message: result?.error || 'Zoom IPC failed', url: tab.url });
}).catch(err => addDiagnostic({ type: 'zoom-error', message: err.message, url: tab.url }));
addDiagnostic({ type: 'zoom-error', message: err.message, url: tab.url });
function activeTab() { return tabs.find(t => t.id === activeTabId); }
function showOnlyPanel(panel) { panels().forEach(p => p.classList.toggle('hidden', p !== panel)); }
h2.innerHTML = `${escapeHtml(title)}`;
const set = (id, value) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = value; };
const session = tabs.map(t => ({ url: t.url, title: t.title }));
localStorage.setItem('kayockSession', JSON.stringify({ activeTabId, tabs: session, currentTrackId }));

if (!list.some(t => t.id === defaultTrackId)) list.unshift({ id: defaultTrackId, name: 'Base Camp', icon: '🦅', color: 'gold', tabs: [], created: new Date().toISOString(), updated: new Date().toISOString() });
return [{ id: defaultTrackId, name: 'Base Camp', icon: '🦅', color: 'gold', tabs: [], created: new Date().toISOString(), updated: new Date().toISOString() }];
function saveTracks(items) { localStorage.setItem('kayockTracks', JSON.stringify(items)); renderTracks(); updateCampfire(); }
function currentTrack() { return getTracks().find(t => t.id === currentTrackId) || getTracks()[0]; }
function tabSnapshot(tab) { return { url: tab.url, title: tab.title || makeTitle(tab.url), pinned: !!tab.pinned, saved: new Date().toISOString() }; }
const track = { id: 'track-' + Date.now(), name: clean, icon: '📂', color: 'gold', tabs: [], created: new Date().toISOString(), updated: new Date().toISOString() };
const tracks = getTracks(); tracks.unshift(track); saveTracks(tracks); switchTrack(track.id, false); showHunterToast(`Created Track: ${clean}`, 'Tracks');
const savedTabs = (track.tabs || []).length ? track.tabs : [{ url: 'kayock://home', title: 'Kayock Home' }];
if (trackId === defaultTrackId) { showHunterToast('Base Camp cannot be deleted.', 'Tracks'); return; }
if (!confirm(`Delete Track "${track.name}"? Saved tabs in this Track will be removed from the workspace list.`)) return;

card.innerHTML = `
${escapeHtml(track.icon || '📂')} ${escapeHtml(track.name)}${count} tab${count === 1 ? '' : 's'} · ${track.id === currentTrackId ? 'Active' : 'Sleeping'}
`;

card.addEventListener('drop', e => { e.preventDefault(); card.classList.remove('dropReady'); const tabId = Number(e.dataTransfer.getData('text/kayock-tab-id')); if (tabId) moveTabToTrack(tabId, track.id); });

card.querySelector('[data-action="save"]').addEventListener('click', () => { currentTrackId = track.id; localStorage.setItem('kayockCurrentTrack', currentTrackId); syncCurrentTrackFromOpenTabs(); renderTracks(); showHunterToast(`Saved open tabs to ${track.name}`, 'Tracks'); });
addDiagnostic({ type: 'hunter-writing-css-error', message: err.message, url: tab.url });
// Popups are routed into Kayock tabs by main-process handlers; do not grant raw popup power here.
webview.setAttribute('webpreferences', `contextIsolation=yes, nodeIntegration=no, spellcheck=yes, webSecurity=yes, allowRunningInsecureContent=no, javascript=${allowJs ? 'yes' : 'no'}`);
